OmicsKit 1.0.0.0000
  • Reference

    Reference

    All functions

    add_annotations()

    A function to add annotations to a table of gene counts.

    barplot_GSEA()

    Create and save a customized barplot for GSEA results

    detect_filter()

    Find detectable genes across comparisons.

    get_annotations()

    Get annotations from Ensembl.

    get_stars()

    Obtain annotations to display significance.

    heatmap_GSEA()

    Plot leading edge heatmaps from GSEA results.

    merge_GSEA()

    Merge GSEA results data frames.

    nice_KM()

    Function to generate Kaplan Meier survival plots for a given binary gene variable

    nice_PCA()

    Function to make nice PCA plots

    nice_tSNE()

    Function to make tSNE plots.

    nice_UMAP()

    Function to make UMAP plots.

    nice_Volcano()

    Function to draw Volcano plots.

    nice_VSB()

    Function to make Violin-Scatter-Box plots.

    plot_GSEA()

    Plot global GSEA results

    power_analysis()

    Power analysis for RNA-seq differential expression with optional plotting

    raw_counts

    GDC TCGA Lung Adenocarcinoma (LUAD) - Raw STAR counts

    sampledata

    GDC TCGA Lung Adenocarcinoma (LUAD) - Metadata

    save_results()

    Save the results of a Differential Expression analysis

    split_cases()

    Obtain 10 exclusive cases from 3 comparisons.

    tpm()

    Function to calculate the TPMs from a table of raw gene counts.

    Contents

    Developed by Daniel Guevara, Daniel Garbozo, Angela Alarcon, Jennifer Almeyda, David Requena.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
